title: MagicBricks South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: MagicBricks South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at MagicBricks South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About MagicBricks South Asia Partners:
MagicBricks South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks South Asia Partners!
